## What does this PR do?
A 1-3 sentence summary.

## Why is this change needed?
Link the issue: `Closes #123` or `Refs #456`.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (please describe migration path)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test addition / fix
- [ ] Build / CI / dependency

## How was this tested?
- [ ] New unit tests added
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -q`)
- [ ] Manual reproduction steps:
  1.
  2.
  3.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (`ruff check` passes)
- [ ] Self-reviewed
- [ ] Commented hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, docs/, docstrings)
- [ ] Added entry to `CHANGELOG.md` (if user-facing)
- [ ] No secrets / API keys committed
- [ ] Backward compatible (or migration documented)
- [ ] Bumped version in `pyproject.toml` (if releasing)

## Screenshots / Recordings
If UI change, attach before/after.

## Breaking Changes
Describe the impact on existing users. Provide migration path.

## Dependencies
- New packages added: list with version constraints
- Removed packages: list and why
